name: Stardust Sifr Divine Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>珖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> スターダスト・シフル
name_jp_tl: Sacred Karat God Dragon - Stardust Sifr
desc:
1 Tuner Synchro Monster + 2+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
Must be Synchro Summoned. The first time each card you control would be destroyed each turn, by battle or card effect, it is not destroyed. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy 1 card on the field. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Level 8 or lower "Stardust" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Requires both Tuner and non-Tuner Synchro Monsters as Synchro Materials
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
